items.title_en: Google races to put Gemini at the center of Android before Apple’s AI reboot

items.title_zh: 专家分析：2026-27年学生贷款利率将上涨
items.desc_en: Federal student loan interest rates will rise in the 2026-27 academic year, according to an exclusive analysis provided to CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 根据 CNBC 提供的独家分析，联邦学生贷款利率将在 2026-27 学年上升。

items.title_en: Waymo recalls 3,800 robotaxis after glitch allowed some vehicles to 'drive into standing water'
items.title_zh: Waymo 因故障导致部分车辆“驶入积水”，召回 3,800 辆机器人出租车
items.desc_en: Waymo issued a voluntary recall of about 3,800 of its robotaxis to fix software issues that could allow them to drive into flooded roadways.
items.desc_zh: Waymo 自愿召回约 3,800 辆机器人出租车，以修复可能允许它们驶入被洪水淹没的道路的软件问题。

items.title_zh: 特朗普不需要国会重启伊朗袭击：赫格塞斯
items.desc_en: The Iran war, now well into its third month, has caused oil prices to soar globally as Iran continues to lock down the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title_en: Social Security COLA for 2027 may be higher as inflation rises, new estimates find
items.title_zh: 新估计发现，随着通胀上升，2027 年社会保障 COLA 可能会更高
items.desc_en: As the pace of inflation increases, that may lead to a higher Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027, according to new expert estimates.
items.desc_zh: 根据新的专家估计，随着通货膨胀速度加快，可能会导致 2027 年社会保障生活成本调整更高。

items.title_zh: 伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升，美国通胀率跃升至3.8%

items.title_en: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
items.title_zh: 特朗普将带十几名美国高管前往中国。黄仁勋不是其中之一
items.desc_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋不会参加特朗普的中国之行，但其他十几位美国高管却参加了。

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.title_zh: 乌干达总统宣誓就职，创历史第七个任期
items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.title_en: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
items.title_zh: 冯德莱恩：欧盟需要推迟儿童使用社交媒体的时间
items.desc_en: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
items.title_zh: 墨西哥取消为世界杯提前结束学年的计划
items.desc_en: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
items.desc_zh: 家长们对因锦标赛而于 6 月 5 日而不是 7 月 15 日结束课程的提议感到愤怒，并且预计会出现极热天气。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.desc_en: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。
